folar-de-carnes-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Meat Folar – Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 sachet dried baker yeast or 25 gr moist baker yeast

instructions: Put in a bowl the yeast with the water, stirring well Add the olive oil, eggs and flour Sprinkle with a little salt and knead everything very well until a homogeneous and very well connected mass becomes If necessary sprinkle with some flour

Sprinkle some flour in a bowl, put the dough, sprinkle it with a little more flour and cover with a damp cloth or adherent film Let it leave till it gets triple your volume After that time, remove the dough from the bowl, knead again and divide it into two parts

Garnish a tray with olive oil and have one of the parts of the dough, stretch with your hand until you cover the entire tray Remove the coyrate from the bacon and cut into pieces Remove the skin from the sausage and cut into slices Have all sausages over the dough

Stretch the rest of the dough on a flour-filled countertop and have it on top Brush with the mixture of the yolk and let it leave a little more till it grows about 2 fingers in height Take then to the oven preheated to 180 degrees for 35 to 40 minutes until it is cooked and golden Remove from the oven, peel and serve decorated to taste

macaroni-and-cheese-balls-or-mac-and-che.name: Macaroni And Cheese Balls Or Mac And Cheese
macaroni-and-cheese-balls-or-mac-and-che.original_name: Bolitas de macarrones con queso o Mac and Cheese

ingredients.item: Filling oil (may be sunflower or olive as your preferred)
250 g de coditos de pasta (u otra pasta corta)
2 tazas de leche (puede ser entera o semi-descremada)
2 tazas de queso cheddar o gruyere rallado (puedes usar una mezcla de quesos si prefieres)
1/2 cucharadita de mostaza en polvo (opcional, para un toque extra de sabor)

instructions: In a big pot, it boils water with salt. Add pasta and cooking as instructed by the package till they are to the dente. Drain and reserve.

In the same pot, melt butter over medium heat. Once melted, add flour and kitchen, stirring constantly, for 1-2 minutes. That forms a roux that will help to weigh the salsa. A little by little, pour milk into the pot, constantly biting to prevent them from growing up. Cooking for a few minutes, till the mixture weighs and has a soft consistency. It reduces fire to low and adds the grated cheese to the salsa, stirring until completely melting. If you're using powder mustard, add it now. Test the salsa and suit with salt and pepper to taste.
Agrega los macarrones cocidos a la olla con la salsa de queso y mezcla bien para que toda la pasta quede cubierta con la salsa cremosa.

With the leftovers that have stayed with you we have prepared the balls. If the macaroni you have are very cold and compact, heat them slightly in the microwave for about 20-30 seconds, just enough to get them a little more manageable. We don't want them to be hot, but they can be mold with ease. With his hands, he takes small portions of macaroni with cheese and gives them the shape of balls as big as a nut. If you prefer the balls to be bigger or smaller, you can adjust the size as you suit them. Once you have all the balls formed, pass them first by the beamed egg and then by the frosted bread, covering them well. Be sure that the frosted bread fully adheres to the balls as this will give them a crisp texture by frying them. Refrigerate for at least half an hour at the refrigerator or freezer.

Warm the oil into a frying pan with medium-high heat. Once hot, fry the balls into small pits and turn them with care so that they are put to a uniform glow throughout. That will take about 2-3 minutes for each batch, until they are golden and crispy. Put fried balls onto absorbing paper to remove excess oil. If you prefer a lighter choice and want to avoid frying, you can bake the balls. It purifies the oven at 200-3-pic (204-3-pic) and puts the balls in a baking plate with an oven paper. It scuba with spray and purple oil for about 15-20 minutes, or until they are golden and crispy. To make them with an air fryer cook the balls at 200 ″ 3 ″, at the pressurized airfryer, for 8-10 minutes. Mid of the cooking (after about 4-5 minutes), open the basket and shake the balls or turn them around to make sure they are put on a uniform suit.
Serves with ketchup sauce or any other sauce you like.
macaroni-and-cheese-balls-or-mac-and-che.category: Fast and easy dinners, Apperitory recipes, Tapas and Pinchos

magic-cookie-bars-from-eagle-brand.name: Magic Cookie Bars From Eagle Brand
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). If using a glass dish, preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Coat a 9x13-inch baking dish with cooking spray.
Mix graham cracker crumbs and butter in a bowl until well combined. Transfer the mixture to the prepared baking dish and press onto the bottom.
Pour sweetened condensed milk on graham cracker crust.
Sprinkle with an even layer of chocolate chips, coconut, and nuts.
Press toppings down firmly with the back of a fork.
Bake in the preheated oven until lightly browned, about 25 minutes. Cool completely, then cut into 36 bars or diamonds.
Serve and enjoy!

make-a-delicious-falafel-wrap-with-hummu.name: Make A Delicious Falafel Wrap With Hummus
make-a-delicious-falafel-wrap-with-hummu.original_name: Haz un rico wrap de falafel con hummus

ingredients.item: 250 gr de garbanzos secos ((remojados en agua durante la noche))
Tortillas de trigo o pan pita

instructions: Drain the moist and place them in a food processor.
Add onion, garlic, parsley, cilantro, cumin, ground cilantro, baking powder, salt and pepper.
It processes up to a homogenous but textured blend.
It forms small balls or croquetes with the mixture.
Fry in hot oil until they are golden and crispy. Drain onto absorbing paper.
Calienta ligeramente las tortillas o el pan pita.
Unta una capa generosa de hummus sobre la tortilla.
Coloca 2-3 falafels sobre el hummus.
Add lettuce, tomato cuts, cucumber and Red onion.
Add some taheni or yogurt sauce if desired.
Fold the omelette firmly and cut in half if preferred. Enjoy!

make-juicy-and-crispy-roasted-apples-in-.name: Make Juicy And Crispy Roasted Apples In An Airfryer
make-juicy-and-crispy-roasted-apples-in-.original_name: Haz unas jugosas y crocantes manzanas asadas en airfryer
instructions: Wash the apples and get them. With an apple depressor, remove your heart and make sure you don't get to the bottom so that the pilling doesn't get out. Do a small cut about half the apple to avoid breaking while cooking.
In a small bowl, mix dark sugar (or honey), cinnamon, minced nuts and raisins.
Fill the hole for each apple with the above mixture. Put a small piece of butter above the fill of every apple.
It purifies the airfryer to 180 been 3 been (180 been 3) for 3 minutes. Put the apples in the airfryer basket and cook for 15- 20 minutes, or till the apples are tender and the pilling bubbling.
Roast some lemon juice onto roasted apples before serving to add a fresh touch and contrasting the sweeter.

make-these-chocolate-waffles-comedera.name: Make These Chocolate Waffles
make-these-chocolate-waffles-comedera.original_name: Haz estos waffles de chocolate caseros

ingredients.item: 200 gr de harina de trigo regular, no leudante.

instructions: We're going to start our recipe by mixing wheat flour, cocoa, pint of salt, sugar and baking powder into a bowl. Mix them up till they get really well integrated.
In another bowl, we'll put the eggs and beat them up and get a sparkling blend.
Add to an egg bowl, melted butter, milk and a tablespoon of vanilla. With a spatula, mix gently so as to avoid breaking the air into the eggs.
Now, we'll integrate the flour into the mix progressively and you'll beat at medium speed till everything's built up and get a creamy and thick texture.
Lista nuestra mezcla, procede a calentar tu wafflera. Si es necesario, puedes engrasarla un poco.
Es momento de verter un poco de la mezcla en la wafflera, procurando que cubra toda la superficie, pero que no se derrame.
Cover your waffle and let them cook. They are regularly from 5 to 6 minutes, depending on your machine. You'll know when they're golden and delicious.
Repite el procedimiento con toda la mezcla hasta que tengas tus waffles.
Enjoy them!

make-ahead-black-eyed-pea-salad.name: Make-ahead Black-eyed Pea Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place dried peas into a large container and cover with several inches of cool water. Let soak, 8 hours to overnight; drain and rinse.
Place peas in a large stockpot and cover with at least 2 inches of water; bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until peas are tender, about 1 to 1½ hours; drain and rinse well with cold water.
Place peas in a large bowl; mix in bell peppers, onion, celery, and scallions.
Mix oil, vinegar, sugar, garlic, hot sauce, salt, and pepper in a small bowl. Add to pea mixture and toss to coat.
Cover and marinate in the refrigerator for 8 hours, or overnight. Add parsley and basil just before serving.

make-ahead-turkey.name: Make-ahead Turkey

ingredients.prep: boneless turkey breasts (2–4 lb. total), patted dry
bone-in turkey legs (3–4 lb. total), patted dry

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 tbsp. plus  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Let 2 skin-on, boneless turkey breasts (2–4 lb. total), patted dry, and 2 skin-on, bone-in turkey legs (3–4 lb. total), patted dry, sit at room temperature 30 minutes.

Place 2 racks toward middle of oven; preheat to 325°. Whisk ¾ cup (1½ sticks) unsalted butter, melted, slightly cooled, ¼ cup pure maple syrup, 3 Tbsp. garlic powder, 3 Tbsp. smoked paprika, 3 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce, 2 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 Tbsp. plus ½ tsp. Morton Kosher salt, and 2 Tbsp. freshly ground pepper in a small bowl until smooth. Spread over turkey, doing your best to evenly coat on all sides, especially the top skin. (The butter has a tendency to firm up and unevenly coat the turkey, but it will melt in the oven anyway so don’t fret.)

Place very large sheets of parchment paper on 2 rimmed baking sheets. Divide 3 small oranges, halved, or quartered if larger, 3 shallots, unpeeled, halved through root ends, and 6 sprigs thyme between baking sheets, arranging in the center. Place turkey breasts on 1 baking sheet and legs on the other. Set another very large sheet of parchment on top of each, then fold edges of bottom sheet over top sheet several times and crimp and pinch to tightly seal to make airtight packets. (If your turkey pieces are especially large, you can use 4 pieces of parchment paper per baking sheet, layering 2 sheets on top of each other to create a larger bag. You can also use large sheets of foil or parchment roasting bags if you prefer.)

Bake packets, rotating baking sheets top to bottom and front to back halfway through, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of a breast and leg registers 150°, 60–80 minutes, depending on the size of your turkey pieces. You can poke the thermometer directly through the bags to check the temperature, or carefully open and reclose the packets. Turkey will continue cooking after you remove it from the oven and the temperature will climb. The legs and breasts might be done cooking at different times. Start checking the internal temperature of both at 45 minutes and monitor every 15 minutes. (Don’t worry if some of the liquid has spilled out onto baking sheets. This will not cause the turkey to come out dry.)

Do Ahead: Turkey can be baked in packets 3 days ahead. Let cool (keeping packets unopened), then consolidate onto 1 baking sheet. Tightly wrap and chill.

About 30 minutes before you’re ready to serve the turkey, increase oven temperature to 475°. Consolidate both packets onto 1 baking sheet. (If you cooked your turkey ahead, place a rack in middle of oven and preheat to 475°. Remove baking sheets with turkey packets from the fridge.) Remove top sheet of parchment paper from each packet and let turkey sit at room temperature while oven comes up to temperature.

Brush about half of ⅓ cup extra-virgin olive oil evenly over turkey skin. Bake turkey, rotating baking sheet front to back and brushing remaining oil over skin halfway through, until skin is deep golden brown and meat is warmed through and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part registers about 130°, 25–30 minutes. Transfer turkey to a cutting board and let rest 15 minutes before carving.
Arrange turkey on a platter and spoon any pooled juices and butter on baking sheet over. Tuck roasted oranges and shallots and some thyme sprigs (if using) around.

malfatti-with-pancetta-and-cherry-tomato.name: Malfatti With Pancetta And Cherry Tomatoes

ingredients.prep: finely grated, plus more for serving

instructions: Dust a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet generously with flour; set aside. Place ricotta in the center of cheesecloth. Gather up the sides in your hands and wring out excess liquid. Transfer ricotta to a few sheets of paper towels and pat dry with more paper towels.

Pulse ricotta, egg, 6 oz. Parmesan, and 1½ tsp. salt in a food processor to combine. Transfer to a large bowl; sift in 1 cup flour and mix until just barely combined (try not to overmix). Scrape ricotta mixture onto a floured surface and divide into 4 pieces. Roll each piece into a 22x¾" rope. Cut into ¾" pieces and place dumplings on prepared baking sheet.

Combine pancetta and 3 Tbsp. oil in a cold large skillet and set over medium heat. Cook, stirring often, until pancetta is brown and crisp, 6–8 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer to a bowl; reserve skillet.
Meanwhile, bring a large pot of water to a simmer (do not let it boil). Working in batches if needed, cook dumplings until they expand in size and float to the surface, about 3 minutes.

Ladle about ¾ cup pasta cooking liquid into reserved skillet and add dumplings, tomatoes, and butter. Increase heat to medium-high and cook, stirring gently (don’t toss), until sauce thickens slightly and coats dumplings, about 4 minutes. Remove from heat and season with salt and pepper.
Divide malfatti among bowls. Finely grate lemon zest over, drizzle with oil, and top with pancetta and Parmesan.

mamon-sponge-cakes.name: Mamon (sponge Cakes)
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease 16 muffin cups.

Stir flour, 1 cup sugar, baking powder, and salt together in a large bowl until well combined. Make a well in the center and add oil, egg yolks, orange peel, vanilla, orange juice, and water. Mix well by hand until smooth with no lumps. Set aside.

Beat egg whites and cream of tartar in a large glass or metal mixing bowl until foamy. Gradually add 1/2 cup sugar, continuing to beat until soft peaks form. Lift your beater or whisk straight up: egg whites should form soft mounds rather than a sharp peak.
Fold flour mixture into egg whites until incorporated. Pour batter into the prepared muffin cups to about 2/3 full.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 40 minutes. Cool in the pans for 10 minutes before removing to cool completely on a wire rack.

man-buns.name: Man Buns
instructions: Preheat oven to 325°. Season pork with pepper and 2 tsp. salt. Heat oil in a medium Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium high heat and cook pork until golden brown on all sides, 8–10 minutes. Stir in onion to coat, then add beer and bring to a simmer.
Cover and cook in oven until pork is falling apart, 2 1/2–3 hours. Let cool slightly. Shred pork with 2 forks, mixing with braising liquid and onion; season with salt and pepper.
DO AHEAD: Pork filling can be made 5 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill.

Preheat oven to 425°. Gently warm milk in a small saucepan over medium heat until warm (do not let it get hot). Transfer to the bowl of a stand mixer and whisk in yeast and brown sugar. Let sit until yeast starts to foam, about 5 minutes. Add flour, salt, baking powder, and butter and knead with dough hook until dough is smooth and elastic, about 5 minutes. (Dough should not be sticky or tacky.)

Lightly coat a medium bowl with nonstick spray and transfer dough to bowl. Cover with plastic wrap and let stand in a warm, draft-free place until doubled in size, 1 1/2–2 hours. Alternatively, cover dough and chill overnight.
Divide dough into 10 pieces. Using the palm of your hand, gently roll pieces on an unfloured surface into balls. Loosely cover with plastic wrap and let stand 10 minutes.

Using the palm of your hand, flatten each ball into 3”-diameter rounds. Place 2 Tbsp. pork filling in the center of each round. Bring up edges and pinch together to create a parcel. Gently roll buns, seam side down, to close.
Bring 2 quarts salted water to a boil and add baking soda.
Line a rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper and spray with nonstick spray.
Working in batches, boil buns 2 minutes (they will puff up and float, so don’t crowd the pot). Using a slotted spoon, transfer to prepared baking sheet, spacing about 1 1/2” apart.
Brush buns with egg and sprinkle with sea salt. Bake, rotating halfway through, until golden brown, 20–25 minutes.
Serve immediately with mustard, pickles, and beer.

mandarin-cake-with-whole-mandarins-argir.name: Mandarin Cake With Whole Mandarins
instructions: Wash the tangerines and boil them with water for 10 minutes. Let them cool.
Brush with butter a small cake pan and make with non-stick paper.
Preheat the evening to 160°C, in the air.
Cut the tangerines to four and remove any pits.
Put them in the blender's bin.
Add the eggs, sunflower oil and sugar and mash them.
Shake the flour with baking powder and soda into the liquid mixture and fold gently with spatula to fully integrate.
Pour the mixture into the pan and bake on the medium rack of the preheated oven for 45 minutes.
Allow the easy tangerine cake to stand in the form for 15 minutes and then rinse carefully.

mango-chutney-recipe-comedera.name: Mango Chutney Recipe
instructions: Lava, pela y corta la manga en cubos medianos.
In a bowl mix mango with all spices. The idea is to form as a purée with whole pieces of fruit. Just leave this training by marinating from day to day.
The following day, she finely pits onion and garlic and adds this to mango purée. Also add the other ingredients from the recipe and stir up evenly.
Cocina el mango a fuego a suave durante unos 40 minutos, removiendo de forma ocasional para evitar que se pegue. El resultado debe tener una textura como de mermelada.
Let rest and as soon as the mango chutney is at room temperature, it keeps in the refrigerator inside a glass bottle with cover.

mango-with-fried-shallots.name: Mango With Fried Shallots

ingredients.prep: thinly sliced red chile (such as Fresno), and small basil leaves (for serving)

instructions: Arrange mangoes on a large plate. Whisk oil, fish sauce, and lime juice in a small bowl to combine. Drizzle dressing over mangoes, then top with fried shallots, chile, and basil.

maple-barbecue-grilled-chicken.name: Maple Barbecue Grilled Chicken

ingredients.prep: cut into 6–8 pieces, or whatever bone-in cut of chicken you feel like cooking

instructions: Heat olive oil in a small saucepan over medium. Cook garlic, turning occasionally, until golden brown, about 4 minutes. Add tomato paste and cook, stirring constantly and scraping bottom of pan, until slightly darkened, about 3 minutes. Add maple syrup, soy sauce, Worcestershire sauce, vinegar, and Sriracha. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to medium-low and simmer until flavors have come together, about 1 minute. Remove from heat. Transfer about half of barbecue sauce to a heatproof bowl and set aside for serving.

Prepare a grill for medium-high indirect heat (for a charcoal grill, bank coals on one side of grill; for a gas grill, leave one or two burners off); oil grate. Season chicken generously with salt. Grill chicken over direct heat, turning every minute, until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Move chicken over indirect heat. Cover, positioning vent (if your grill has one) over chicken, and continue to grill, keeping grill covered as much as possible and turning every 5 minutes or so, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into thickest part registers 60°C–63°C, 18–25 minutes depending on the size of the pieces. Baste chicken with barbecue sauce and grill, turning and basting occasionally, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into thickest part registers 71°C for breast and 74°C for dark meat, about 10 minutes longer.
Arrange chicken on a platter. Serve with reserved barbecue sauce alongside.
Do Ahead: Barbecue sauce can be made 2 weeks ahead. Transfer to an airtight container; cover and chill.

maqlubeh-palestinian-upside-down-meat-ve.name: Maqlubeh (palestinian 'upside Down' Meat, Vegetables, And Rice)

ingredients.prep: or a mix of drumsticks and thighs

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal kosher salt; for table salt
ingredients.prep: use half as much by volume or the same weight

ingredients.item: 10.5 ounces (750g; about 3 1/2 generous cups) jasmine rice

ingredients.prep: sliced crosswise into 3/4 inch thick rounds

ingredients.item: ​​ diamond crystal kosher salt; for table salt
ingredients.prep: use about half as much by volume or the same weight

ingredients.item: Plain or greek whole milk yogurt

instructions: For the Broth: In a heavy-bottomed stock pot, heat olive oil over medium-high heat until shimmering. Add chicken, skin side down, and sear until the chicken is golden-brown all over and releases easily from the pot, about 5 minutes per side.

Add the allspice, black peppercorns, cloves, cardamom, bay leaves, cinnamon sticks, tomato paste, and turmeric and stir to coat the chicken. Add the whole onion along with 10 1/2 cups water and the salt, and bring to a boil. Let boil for 5 minutes, skimming any scum that rises to the surface, then reduce heat to medium-low and simmer until the chicken is cooked through but not falling apart, about 1 hour. Using tongs, transfer chicken to a plate or platter and set aside.
Allow broth to cool slightly, then strain through a fine-mesh strainer set through a large heatproof bowl. Discard solids and set broth aside.

Meanwhile, for the Maqlubeh: While the broth is simmering, set rice in a large mixing bowl and wash in several changes of cold water, swishing well with your hand each time, until the water is clear. Cover rice with fresh cold water and let soak for 25 minutes.

Fill a Dutch oven, wok, or large sauté pan, with about 1 inch of vegetable oil. Heat oil over high heat to 191°C (190°C). Working in batches to avoid crowding the oil, fry eggplant slices in a single layer, turning once halfway through, until golden-brown on both sides, about 5 minutes. Carefully transfer fried eggplant to a paper towel–lined platter or baking sheet. Once all the eggplant has been fried, repeat with cauliflower, frying florets until golden brown all over.
Drain rice well, return to mixing bowl, then stir in the olive oil, turmeric, allspice, cinnamon, black pepper, and salt until thoroughly combined.

To assemble the maqlubeh, grease the interior of a large nonstick pot (approximately 10-inches wide and 5-inches high) with ghee; if you do not have a nonstick pot, then line the bottom of a Dutch oven or stainless steel pot with a round piece of parchment paper and then grease with ghee.

Arrange the cooked chicken, skin side down, in the pot. Spread one third of the rice on top in as even a layer as possible. Layer the fried eggplant and cauliflower on top as evenly as possible; you can arrange them in two separate stacked layers, as a single layer split down the middle with cauliflower on one side and eggplant on the other, or freely mixed together. Top with the remaining rice, spreading it in an even layer; you should not see the vegetables through the rice, or, at most, see only some edges popping through.
Set an inverted heatproof plate, slightly smaller than the circumference of the pot, over the rice. This weighs down the maqlubeh, helping it retain its distinctive layers.

Ladle broth on top until it reaches approximately 3/4 inch (2cm) above the rice and other ingredients. Cover, set on medium heat and bring to a boil, then reduce heat to maintain a strong simmer and cook for 10 minutes. Lower the heat to a very gentle simmer and cook until all the liquid has been absorbed, 10 to 15 minutes longer. Remove from heat.

Using tongs and an oven mitt or kitchen towel, carefully remove the inverted plate. Set a well-fitting lid on the pot, sandwiching a clean tea towel or paper towels between the pot and the lid. Set aside to steam for 15 to 20 minutes. For crispier rice, see note at end.

For the Almonds: In a small skillet, pour in enough olive oil to thinly coat the bottom (about 1 to 2 tablespoons). Add the almonds and cook over medium heat, stirring continuously, until almonds are a light golden color, about 5 minutes. Remove from the heat and drain on a plate lined with paper towels. Alternatively, place the almonds on a small sheet pan and toast in a 177°C (175°C) oven until golden, about 5 minutes.
To Serve: Remove the lid and place a large, inverted serving platter on top of the pot. Using both hands, quickly but carefully flip the pot over. Slowly lift the pot to reveal the dish.
Give the serving platter a gentle shake back and forth to help disperse the rice grains. Sprinkle with toasted almonds and serve alongside Palestinian salad and fresh yogurt.

marinara-meatballs.name: Marinara Meatballs
instructions: Preheat oven to 218°C (220°C).
In a medium-size bowl mix together the beef, pork, bread crumbs, onion, parsley, garlic, eggs, salt, and pepper until just combined.
Take a walnut size of the meat mixture and roll into a ball. Repeat with remaining meat and transfer to an oiled rack on a sheet tray.
Bake meatballs for 15 minutes, until golden brown. Set aside.
Add a little oil to a pan on medium-high heat and cook the onions and garlic until they are deeply caramelized.
Add in the oregano, parsley, basil, red pepper flakes, tomato paste, and tomato sauce.
Stir the mixture and bring to a simmer for 5 minutes.
Add the meatballs and coat them with the sauce.
Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese, poke with toothpicks, and serve!
Enjoy!

marinated-grilled-pork-tenderloin.name: Marinated Grilled Pork Tenderloin
instructions: Make marinade: Whisk together honey, soy sauce, oyster sauce, brown sugar, ginger, ketchup, garlic, parsley, onion powder, cayenne pepper, and cinnamon in a medium bowl; pour into a resealable plastic bag.
Place pork tenderloins into the bag; coat with marinade, squeeze out excess air, and seal the bag. Marinate in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour or up to 24 hours.
Preheat the grill for medium heat and lightly oil the grate.
Remove pork tenderloins from marinade; shake off excess. Discard remaining marinade.

Cook pork tenderloins on the preheated grill until no longer pink in the center, 20 to 30 minutes, turning occasionally. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the centers should read at least 63°C (63 degrees C).

marmalade-cake.name: Marmalade Cake

ingredients.item: Grand marnier or other orange-flavored liqueur

instructions: Using a sharp knife, cut all rind and white pith from oranges in wide strips. Trim off any flesh still clinging to the white pith. Place peel in a small heavy saucepan. Add cold water to cover; bring to a boil. Drain. Repeat with cold water. Drain; reserve peel.

Combine sugar and 2 cups water in same saucepan. Stir over medium heat until sugar dissolves. Add the orange peel, star anise, and vanilla bean. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer, partially covered and stirring occasionally, until peel is soft and syrup has thickened, 50–60 minutes. Let cool slightly. Transfer peel to a cutting board and thinly slice. Return peel to syrup. DO AHEAD: Can be made 1 week ahead. Place in a jar, cover, and chill.
Preheat oven to 350°. Butter pan. Line with a parchment-paper round; butter paper. Bring currants and Grand Marnier to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium heat. Remove from heat and let steep.

Meanwhile, sift flour, baking powder, and salt into a medium bowl. Using an electric mixer, beat 10 Tbsp. butter and sugar in a large bowl until light and fluffy, about 3 minutes. Beat in orange juice, marmalade, and orange zest. Beat in eggs one at a time, blending well between additions (mixture may look curdled).

Add dry ingredients in 3 additions and milk in 2 additions, beginning and ending with dry ingredients and beating to blend between additions. Beat in any Grand Marnier not absorbed by the currants. Fold in currants. Pour batter into prepared pan; smooth the top.

Bake cake until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean and the top is golden, 40–45 minutes. Let cool in pan on a wire rack. DO AHEAD: Can be made 1 day ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.
Remove pan sides from cake. Invert onto a serving plate. Arrange candied orange peel over and brush with some of syrup, if desired.

marshmallow-rice-krispie-treats.name: Marshmallow Rice Krispie Treats
instructions: Melt butter in a large saucepan over low heat.
Add marshmallows and stir until melted and well combined. Cook 2 minutes longer, stirring constantly. Remove from heat.
Stir in crispy rice cereal until well coated.
Press mixture evenly and firmly into a buttered 9x13-inch pan using a buttered spatula or waxed paper.
Cut into 2-inch squares when cool.

masa-shortcake-with-macerated-strawberri.name: Masa Shortcake With Macerated Strawberries

ingredients.item: Softly whipped cream and finely grated lemon zest

instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Spray muffin cups lightly with nonstick spray. Flour cups, tapping out excess.

Whisk half-and-half, butter, and lemon zest in a medium bowl. Whisk masa harina, baking powder, salt, and 1 cup flour in a large bowl. Make a well in the center and pour in half-and-half mixture. Mix with a wooden spoon just until incorporated. Divide batter evenly among muffin cups. Bake shortcakes until golden brown and have risen, 15–20 minutes. Let cool 5 minutes in pan, then transfer pan to a wire rack.

Combine sugar, lemon juice, thyme, and ⅓ cup water in a small saucepan. Scrape in vanilla seeds; add pod. Bring to a simmer, stirring to dissolve sugar. Remove from heat and let sit until thyme has infused, 25–30 minutes. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a medium bowl; discard solids. Let cool to room temperature. Add strawberries and let macerate 30 minutes.
Split shortcakes in half lengthwise. Top with strawberries and whipped cream. Garnish with lemon zest.
Do Ahead: Thyme syrup can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

mashed-sweet-potatoes-in-the-slow-cooker.name: Mashed Sweet Potatoes In The Slow Cooker
instructions: Spray the inside of a slow cooker with cooking spray.
Place cubed sweet potatoes in the slow cooker. Add butter and water.

Cook until sweet potatoes are soft when pricked with a fork, 4 hours on Low or 2 hours on High. Turn slow cooker off. Add maple syrup, brown sugar, heavy cream, maple extract, cinnamon, nutmeg and salt to the slow cooker and blend with an immersion blender. Garnish with mini marshmallows.

matzo-ball-soup.name: Matzo Ball Soup

ingredients.item: Melted schmaltz (chicken fat) or vegetable oil
Diamond crystal or  0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt
Plus 3 tbsp. diamond crystal or 1 tsp. plus 1 tbsp. plus 2 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: peeled, 1 cut into 2" pieces, 2 thinly sliced, divided

instructions:
Whisk 6 large eggs in a medium bowl until no streaks remain. Add ½ cup melted schmaltz (chicken fat) or vegetable oil, 6 Tbsp. low-sodium chicken broth or water, 3 Tbsp. chopped fresh dill, 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ¾ tsp. freshly ground black pepper and whisk vigorously to combine. Add 1½ cups matzo meal and whisk until incorporated. Cover and chill matzo ball mixture at least 35 minutes (this is essential as it gives the matzo meal time to hydrate).
Do Ahead: Matzo dough can be made 2 days ahead. Keep refrigerated.

While the matzo ball mixture is chilling, place a rack in top third of oven; preheat to 450°. Place 4 chicken legs (thigh and drumstick; about 3 lb.) on a rimmed baking sheet or a large plate and sprinkle with 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt; let sit at room temperature until ready to use. Spread 6 lb. chicken wings out on another rimmed baking sheet; roast wings until golden brown, 45–55 minutes.

Transfer wings and any accumulated juices on baking sheet to a large pot. Add 2 medium onions, peeled, halved, 2 celery stalks, cut into 2" pieces, 1 medium parsnip, peeled, cut into 2" pieces, 1 medium carrot, peeled, cut into 2" pieces, 1 bunch fresh parsley, 1 Tbsp. black peppercorns, and 4 quarts water. Bring to a simmer and cook, adjusting heat as needed to maintain simmer, until stock is slightly reduced, 40–50 minutes. Add seasoned chicken legs and simmer until legs are very tender, another 40–50 minutes.

While the chicken legs cook, bring 3 quarts water to a boil in a medium pot. Add 3 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 Tbsp. plus 2¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Using damp hands, divide matzo dough into 16 pieces and roll each into about 1½"-diameter ball. It’s okay to really work the dough into balls; it won’t get dense—trust us, we tried! Using a slotted spoon, carefully lower matzo balls into the gently simmering salted water. Reduce heat to low, cover pot, and cook, checking occasionally and adjusting heat if boiling too rapidly, until balls are puffed and light in color, 30–40 minutes. Don’t remove them sooner than this; they will be dense in the middle if undercooked. Remove from heat and let sit while you finish the soup.
Transfer chicken legs to a plate and let sit until cool enough to handle.
Meanwhile, strain stock through a fine-mesh sieve into a medium pot; discard solids.

Remove meat from legs; discard skin and bones. Tear meat into bite-size pieces and return shredded chicken to stock. Add remaining 2 medium carrots, peeled, thinly sliced. Return stock to a simmer and cook until carrots are just tender, about 4 minutes. Taste and season soup with more salt if needed.

Using a slotted spoon, place 2 matzo balls in each bowl. Ladle soup over. Garnish with chopped fresh dill and a few grinds of freshly ground pepper.
Do Ahead: Matzo balls can be cooked 2 days ahead. Transfer to an airtight container along with 2–3 Tbsp. cooking liquid and refrigerate. When reheating, gently lower balls into soup and cook over medium-low until warmed through, about 10 minutes. Chicken stock can be made 3 days ahead; transfer to an airtight container and refrigerate. Store chicken leg meat separately.
Editor’s note: This matzo ball soup recipe was first printed in April 2019 as BA’s Best Matzo Ball Soup. Head this way for more of our favorite Passover foods →

meat-roll-with-potatoes-lezzet.name: Meat Roll With Potatoes
instructions: 1. Oil and wait for 30 minutes with half water glass liquid.
2. Wash and wash the veils.
3. Crochet in apple slice 1 cup of liquid oil.
4. 4 Take another rough to get rid of Kevgirle fat.
5. Blend salt, pepper, red powder pepper and thyme.
6. Adjust and heat the oven to 180 degrees.
7. Place a slice of fried potatoes on the Bonfile slices and wrap in the form of rolls.
8. Index rolls into oven tray.
9. Pour the cake into the ezip tray in hot water.
10. Cook for 30 minutes in the oven.
11. 11. Serve chopped stream.

meatball-stuffed-shell-pasta.name: Meatball Stuffed Shell Pasta
instructions: In a medium bowl, mix together the beef, pork, bread crumbs, onion, Parmesan cheese, garlic, parsley, eggs, salt, and pepper until just combined.
Preheat the oven to 218°C (220°C).
Take a walnut-sized portion of the meat mixture and roll into a ball. Repeat with remaining meat and transfer to an oiled wire rack set over a baking sheet.
Bake the meatballs for 10 minutes, until golden brown.
Make the ricotta-herb mixture: combine the ricotta cheese, basil, parsley, Parmesan cheese, and salt in a medium bowl and mix well.
Stuff a tablespoon of ricotta mixture into a jumbo shells, then stuff a meatball into the shells.
Spread the marinara sauce in the bottom of a 9x13-inch (23x33-cm) casserole dish, then lay in the stuffed shells. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top.
Bake for 10 minutes, until the marinara sauce is warm.
Top with chopped basil.
Enjoy!

meatball-under-mozzarella-ella-ella.name: Meatball: Under Mozzarella-ella-ella
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190°C). Line a baking sheet with foil.
Place the meatballs on the prepared baking sheet. Bake for 30 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 74°C (75°C).
In a medium saucepan over medium heat, bring the alfredo sauce to a simmer.
Place the meatballs and sauce on the ciabatta buns and top with the mozzarella.
Enjoy!

meatballs-in-an-air-fryer-time-and-how-t.name: Meatballs In An Air Fryer (time And How To Fry Them So They Are Juicy)
meatballs-in-an-air-fryer-time-and-how-t.original_name: Albóndigas en freidora de aire (tiempo y cómo freírlas para que queden jugosas)

ingredients.item: 500 g de carne picada mixta de cerdo y ternera

instructions: We put a teaspoon of salt, garlic, a handful of parsley leaves and some pepper and we pat them all. We put the meat in a bowl, we put this paddle, the bread we wet in milk and the egg and we mix it all up, chewing with our hands. It isn't necessary to amass too much because if we do so the flesh will get more dry. It's enough to mix up till the ingredients are combined. We form the meatballs trying to make them all the same size and cook them the same.

Let's put the meatballs in the air fryer and get some space between them. In our case we have put 16 but they can suit up to 20 meatballs depending on their size. To fry the meatballs in the air fryer we recommend that you place an airfryer paper of this type, or as this perforation, so you will not purify the frying basket and avoid washing with every use.

Pulverizes some olive oil onto the meatballs to make them juicy and golden. We use the 5.5L Cosori Air Fairy, 1700 W and we only need 10 minutes at 180 ° C, with no pressurized and no turning and they were perfect, well made inside and very juicy. If your fryer has less power, you may have to add some more minutes but avoid them too far so that they aren't dry.
After time we get our meatballs out of the airfryer (we recommend some tweezers as these to avoid burning)

On this occasion we wanted to prepare tomato meatballs, so we had a homemade fried tomato that we had already made, to accompany our meatballs. If you have no tomato sauce made, follow our recipe step by step, adding the meatballs to the sauce once you get them out of the air fryer. Let them cook with the sauce for a few minutes.
We serve homemade meatballs with white rice and tomato sauce.

mediterranean-egg-salad.name: Mediterranean Egg Salad

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Whisk together oil, za’atar, and lemon juice. Toss with eggs, olives, cilantro, onion, and pine nuts; season with salt and pepper. Serve on toast.

melahrino-naxos-traditional-walnut-pie-a.name: Melahrino Naxos (traditional Walnut Pie)

ingredients.item: 11⁄2 tc citron zest (or bergamot or lemon)
1 piece of rind citro (pergamont or lemon)
11⁄2 tc citron zest (or bergamot or lemon)
1 piece of rind citro (pergamont or lemon)

instructions: Divide the whites from the yolks into two bowls.
Add the fine sugar to the yolks and beat for 3–4 minutes at high speed until they change color and become a velvet cream.
Add the liqueur or cognac, vanilla, spices, baking powder and zest. Beat for 1 minute until the eggs are well joined.
Lower the mixer speed and add the toast and chopped nuts alternately, stirring until the mixture is homogenized. Put it away.
Clean the mixer tools well and, with clean beaters, beat the whites with salt until they become meringue.
Beat at medium speed for 3–4 minutes, until the meringue “makes body” and forms soft drinks standing.
With a spatula, add 2–3 large tabletspoons of meringue to the mixture of the “brown” and generally mix to dilute the texture.
Then, add the rest of the meringue in two doses, gently stirring from the bottom up, so that it does not lose volume.
When the meringue has been fully integrated, preheat the evening to 1703
Butter a 23×30 cm baking pan and pour the mixture in.
Gently straighten the surface with the reverse of a spoon.
Bake for about 1 hour, until the surface is puffed, browned, detached from the walls and stabilised in the center.
Allow the sweet to cool completely before squeezing or serving.

melting-olaf.name: Melting Olaf
instructions: Combine aquavit, St-Germain, and fresh lemon juice in a cocktail shaker. Fill shaker with ice and shake until outside of shaker is frosty, about 30 seconds. Strain into a rocks glass filled with ice and top off with club soda. Garnish with a carrot nose—er—stick.
Note: Carrot nose/stick is mostly a joke.

merzane-lezzet.name: Merzane
instructions: 1. To lengthen eggs.
2. Shake the shells in angry fat without peeling.
3. Internal remove portions and elements.
4. Onion, garlic, peppers, stones and ahalf small parçed in the form.
5. In turn, onions, garlic, peppers, ahtapot, tomatoes and shrimps in the pans in olive oil.
6. Add Patlıcan interior to ezip mix with the help of fork.
7. Buz shield material and fill in the interior of eggs.
8. Add fresh cheese to the car and cook for 15 minutes in the oven.
9. Serve.

mexican-shredded-chicken-soup.name: Mexican Shredded Chicken Soup
instructions: Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat; stir in onion and garlic. Cook and stir until the onion has softened and turned translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add tomatoes, chili powder, cumin, and oregano. Stir in chicken broth and water; bring to a boil. Reduce to a simmer and cook for 5 to 10 minutes.
Add black beans, hominy, chicken, cilantro, and jalapeno pepper. Simmer until heated through, at least 10 minutes.

mexican-telera-bread-comedera.name: Mexican Telera Bread

ingredients.item: 500 gr de harina de trigo tamizada
5 gr de sal ((puedes medir con la punta de una cucharada de sal))

instructions: Take a small bowl, add some warm water, leaven and two tablespoons of sugar. Mix and let rest for 10 minutes till it grows up.
In a bigger bowl, add wheat flour, the remaining tablespoon of sugar and salt. Mix till they get together.
Now, add the leaven to the mixture and start billing.
Amasa hasta que la mezcla tome cuerpo y mucha textura.
Swallow some wheat flour into the counter and pass your mixture. It amasses and with some pounding till it's no longer stick to your hands. That's where you'll know she's ready.
When you finish baking, form a ball and let it stand at a hot place inside a granate and covered with a clean towel to grow up. That's for an hour.
It purifies the oven 180 been 3 been.
Take your mix again and amasas again to remove all the air.
You'll divide your mass into whatever portions you wish. It'll depend how big you give him.
Take the portions and make some balls, you'll put them up a little. Take a knife and make some parallel lines.
On the oven plate, grease with pork butter or vegetable oil and accommodate breads quite space between them. Cover with a clean towel and let them stand for 20- 30 minutes above the oven.
Hornea de 20 a 25 minutos aproximadamente.
Take them out of the oven and they have to be smooth and crispy.
Enjoy them!

meyer-lemon-margarita.name: Meyer Lemon Margarita

ingredients.item: Meyer lemon juice (1-2 whole ripe meyer lemons
ingredients.prep: depending on size.) Do not discard after juicing
pink Himalayan or regionally made salt

ingredients.item: Optional:  0.5 of a ripe passion fruit

instructions: Set up your station: lay a wet paper towel down and a small cutting board over it; first, slice all your ripe meyer lemons in half (take 1 half and slice 2 pinwheels from it, juice what remains). Then, grab citrus juicer to juice approx. ¼ cup of liquid. Pour the juice into the shaker along with 1 tablespoon of sugar cane. Stir together for 30 seconds–until all sugar is completely dissolved. TIP: save your meyer lemon remains to rim your glass with and to later make a preserve.

Gather your 1½ oz. of Patrón Silver Tequila, and add it into your shaker along with ½ cup of ice cubes. (OPTIONAL: to really jazz up your margarita, add half of ripe passion fruit into the shaker, you won’t be disappointed!) Lock in your shaker and shake for 45 seconds until outside of your shaker gets icy.

Before straining over your glass, be sure to grab the remaining ½ of meyer lemon and fold it over the lip of your glass and around to salt the rim (have the salt on a small plate to spin the lip of the glass onto). Once the rim is salted, fill the glass up ½ way with ice then pour the strained drink over it. Garnish with a meyer lemon pinwheel.

microwave-corn-on-the-cob-in-the-husk.name: Microwave Corn On The Cob In The Husk

ingredients.item: Ear fresh corn in the husk

instructions: Rinse corn in the husk under water briefly. Wrap with a paper towel and place on a microwave-safe plate.
Cook corn in the microwave until hot and cooked through, 3 to 5 minutes. Remove from the microwave and let rest for 2 minutes. Remove corn husk.

minced-meat-moussaka-recipe-lezzet.name: Minced Meat Moussaka Recipe
instructions: 1. Peel the eggplants with a crepe, bull the ring.
2. Dry 15 minutes in salted water.
3. Bake eggplants with less fat in the pan or bake 200°C’de cook for 15 minutes.
4. Get olive oil on the pan, roast onions.
5. Cook the water and the water until the water.
6. Add salça, garlic and sauce.
7. Add salt and spices and cook for 10 minutes.
8. Index of eggs in the oven bowl, u mint broadcast on the ground.
9. Hot water and salç mix and explore the veuuml;zerine.
10. 180°C bake 25–30 minutes in oven.
11.  10 dakika dinlendirip servis edin.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

minestrone-soup-italian-vegetable-soup-w.name: Minestrone Soup, Italian Vegetable Soup With Pasta Recipe
minestrone-soup-italian-vegetable-soup-w.original_name: Sopa Minestrone, receta italiana de sopa de verduras con pasta

ingredients.item: 1 cup of green beans, cut into pieces
1 cup of small pasta (e.g. shells or ditallini)
Hojas de albahaca fresca para decorar

instructions: Wash and cut all vegetables as instructed. In a big pot, heats olive oil with medium heat. Add onion and garlic and paddle till clear.
It incorporates carrots, celery, pumpkin, green beans, potato and peas. Cooking for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add crushed tomatoes and vegetable stock. Take the mixture to boiling. It reduces fire and lets soup simmer for about 20 minutes, or till the vegetables are tender.
Add the dough and cook as instructed by the package, usually about 8-10 minutes, till you are at dente. Test and adjust the date with salt and pepper to suit.
Sirve la sopa caliente, decorada con hojas de albahaca fresca y, si lo deseas, espolvorea con queso parmesano rallado.

mini-pot-pies.name: Mini Pot Pies
instructions: Preheat oven to 218°C (220°C).
Add the oil to a large pot over high heat. Once the oil begins to shimmer, add the chicken, and stir until cooked through, about 7 minutes. Transfer the chicken to a bowl.
Melt butter in the same pot. Add the onions and carrots and stir until softened, about 8 minutes.
Add the flour, stirring to combine. Slowly add the milk and chicken broth, alternating between the two, stirring continuously and bringing to a boil.
Add the cooked chicken, peas, salt, and pepper, and stir until thoroughly mixed. Remove from heat and let cool.
Lay out puff pastry sheets and use a small 6-inch (15 cm) bowl to cut circles out of it.
Place dough circles in a nonstick muffin tin and fill with pot pie mixture.
Using remaining puff pastry, cut ⅛-inch (3 mm) strips of dough, and make a lattice top for each muffin cup. Brush the lattice tops with the egg.
Bake for 15 minutes, until golden brown.
Enjoy!

mint-chocolate-leprechaun-shots.name: Mint-chocolate Leprechaun Shots
instructions: Fill a cocktail shaker with ice cubes. Add chocolate liqueur and peppermint schnapps. Shake vigorously for 2 to 3 minutes. Pour into glasses.

Beat heavy cream and vanilla extract in a chilled glass or metal bowl using an electric mixer until frothy. Add confectioners' sugar gradually, continuing to beat until soft peaks form. Beat in enough food coloring to reach desired shade of green.
Place a dollop of green whipped cream on top of each shot and garnish with shaved chocolate.

miso-clam-chowder.name: Miso Clam Chowder
instructions: Melt butter in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add pancetta. Cook until slightly rendered, 5–6 minutes.

Add onion, garlic, and thyme. Cook, stirring often, until onion is soft, 4–5 minutes. Add wine; bring to a boil. Reduce heat; simmer for 2 minutes. Add potatoes, chicken broth, cream, and miso. Simmer until potatoes are tender, 20–30 minutes.
Add clams. Cover; cook until clams open, 5–7 minutes. Season with Tabasco; garnish with parsley.

mixed-bean-salad-with-tomato-vinaigrette.name: Mixed Bean Salad With Tomato Vinaigrette

ingredients.prep: plus 3 tablespoons if using fresh beans

ingredients.item: Fresh shell beans (such as cranberry or butter)
ingredients.prep: shelled, or three 15-ounce cans beans (such as black, cannellini, and/or kidney)
wax, or green beans), thinly sliced on a diagonal

instructions: Purée tomatoes, onion, chiles, cilantro, 1 Tbsp. lime juice, and 1 tsp. salt in a food processor until almost completely smooth. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a medium bowl, pressing on solids to extract as much liquid as possible. Reserve solids for another use (like soffritto). Cover pico de gallo broth and chill until ready to use.

If using fresh beans, bring beans, 3 Tbsp. salt, and 6 cups water to a boil in a medium pot over medium heat. Reduce heat and simmer until beans are tender, 15–45 minutes (fresher beans will cook faster; drier beans will take longer). Taste and season with salt as needed; let beans cool in cooking liquid, about 2 hours.

Drain beans and place in a large bowl. Add snap beans, oil, chia seeds, if using, pico de gallo broth, and remaining 2 Tbsp. lime juice; toss to combine. Let sit 1 hour to allow flavors to meld (chia seeds will bloom and thicken dressing slightly). Taste and season with salt as needed just before serving.
Do Ahead: Salad can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

mocha-white-chocolate-chunk-cookies.name: Mocha White Chocolate Chunk Cookies
instructions: Combine butter, sugars, eggs, instant coffee, and vanilla extract in a large bowl. Beat with an electric mixer until fluffy.

Mix flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt together in a separate bowl. Pour over butter mixture and beat until combined. Fold in white chocolate chunks using a spatula. Cover dough and chill for 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease 2 cookie sheets.
Drop tablespoonfuls of dough onto the prepared baking sheets.
Bake in the preheated oven until edges are lightly browned, 12 to 15 minutes. Allow to cool slightly before removing from the cookie sheets.

mr-and-mrs-miscellaneous-basil-chip-ice-.name: Mr. And Mrs. Miscellaneous Basil-chip Ice Cream
instructions: Set a large metal bowl inside another large bowl filled with ice water. Lightly beat egg yolks in a medium bowl. Bring cream, whole milk, and sugar to a simmer in a medium saucepan. Whisking constantly, gradually stream half of cream mixture into yolks. Return egg mixture to saucepan and cook over medium-high heat, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon, until mixture coats spoon, 2–3 minutes. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into prepared bowl. Stir in condensed milk and salt. Let cool, stirring occasionally, 20–30 minutes, then stir in buttermilk.
Using an immersion blender, mix base until smooth and silky. Add basil; mix until finely chopped. Cover and chill 2 days.
Blend base with immersion blender; strain into an ice cream maker. Process according to manufacturer’s directions.

Meanwhile, grate chocolate on the large holes of a box grater into a large bowl. Add ice cream and fold to evenly incorporate chocolate. Transfer to an airtight container. Cover and freeze at least 2 hours before scooping.

multigrain-seed-biscuits.name: Multigrain Seed Biscuits
instructions: Preheat oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).
Whisk multi-grain flour, wheat flour, sunflower seeds, flax seeds, wheat germ, sugar, baking powder, and salt together in a large bowl.

Grate cold butter into flour mixture using the largest holes of a cheese grater and mix with a fork until it resembles coarse crumbs. Slowly pour in milk and mix until dough begins to pull away from sides of the bowl.
Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface and gently knead to form a soft dough, about 10 turns. Pat into an 8-inch square, cut into quarters, and cut each quarter into 3 rectangular pieces.
Place each piece of dough onto an ungreased baking sheet, about 1 inch apart; brush with egg and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden, 12 to 15 minutes.

mushroom-fricassee-argiro.name: Mushroom Fricassee

ingredients.item: 6fresh onions (brown with their green leaves and coarsely chopped)
6fresh onions (brown with their green leaves and coarsely chopped)

instructions: We use a pot (fresh and shallow). Heat the vessel on high heat and add the olive oil.
Sauté the chopped dried onion, leek and white parts of the fresh versions for 3–4 minutes, stringing until they become transparent.
Add the chopped garlic and sauce for 1 minute. Then add the mushrooms and continue the Sauté for 3–4 minutes.
Add the coarsely chopped lettuces and mix for another 3–4 minutes until they wither.
Add the fresh onions, salt, pepper and about half a cup of water.
Simmer for 20 minutes. In the last few minutes, add the herbs. The food will have a deep, dark color and you can serve it with some lemon juice, ideal for vegan or fasting version.
If you want a richer taste with eggmeal, lower the temperature to 2 and add the eggmeal at the end of cooking.

mushroom-risotto-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Mushroom Risotto In The Oven
instructions: Add the dried mushrooms to a small bowl and pour them with 2 cups of hot broth (from the total recipe). Cover them and leave them for at least 15 minutes, until they soften and recover their moisture.
Then drag them tightly with your hands and strain the soaking stock through a fine sheet or tulle. Throw away the bottom (about 1⁄2 cup).
Preheat the evening to 170.1.3
In a small pot melt the butter and sauté the onion and garlic for 2–3 minutes, until they become clear.
Add the chopped fresh mushrooms and the porcini and leave them 2–3 minutes until they absorb their liquids.
Add the rice and mix to oil well. Add the nutmeg and thyme.
Add the cognac and allow the alcohols to Evaporate for 1–2 minutes.
Add the hot broth and dried mushroom liquid.
Sauté and allow to bottle for 1–2 minutes.
Pour the mixture into the hot fire resistant vessel and bake for 15 minutes.
At this stage risotto is half ready and has some sauce.
Sprinkle with the parmesan, mix and control the salt and pepper.
Bake for an additional 5 minutes.
Serve immediately in simple dishes to stop boiling.
Garnish with parmesan peels and freshly ground pepper.

mushroom-soup-with-tomato-paste-lezzet.name: Mushroom Soup With Tomato Paste
instructions: 1. Clean the mushrooms and slice thin.
2.   peel down and eat.
3. melt the butter in the pan and pink the onion.
4. Add the mushroom and cook the water until the time of the season.
5.  Tuz ve karabiber serpin.
6. Tomato and pepper add them to 2 spoons of water and berries.
7. Cook the hot meat water for 10-15 minutes in pouring jealous fire.
8. Share the cake to the kâ and fortune them as hot.
9. Afiyet olsun.
